svg.text: stage 1 · modality encoders (MLP + LayerNorm + GELU + Dropout)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the gene expression encoder architecture in the BINN?')

g.text: 4 tokens · 4 heads · MultiheadAttention · LayerNorm · FFN · mean pool → 128-dim

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does the BINN use per-modality auxiliary heads?')
sendPrompt('How does the BINN latent space decompose lineage and celltype?')
sendPrompt('How does the BINN lineage head work?')
sendPrompt('How does the adversarial celltype head disentangle the BINN latent space?')
sendPrompt('What is the combined BINN loss function formula?')
g.text: L = λ_lineage · CE_lineage + λ_adv · CE_celltype + λ_aux · CE_aux
λ_lineage=1.0 (class-weighted CE) · λ_adv=0.1 (unweighted) · λ_aux=0.3 (mean over 4 modalities)
